welcome_sub: Birthdays, anniversaries, the small dates that matter. Kindred keeps them, reminds you in time, and never makes you feel behind.
error_sign_in: An error occurred during sign in.
error_password_length: Password should be at least 6 characters.
register_success_email: Registration successful! Please check your email inbox.
join_sub: Save the dates that matter, then stop worrying about them.
contacts_are_only_available_in: Contacts are only available in the Kindred app on your phone.
kindred_can_apos_t_read:
Kindred can't read your address book. You can allow it in your phone's settings, or
            add people by hand instead.
names_photos_and_birthdays_onl: Names, photos and birthdays only. Phone numbers are never read.
pictures_of_the_two_of: Pictures of the two of you, things you did together.
e_g_that_camera_lens: e.g., that camera lens she mentioned
nothing_has_been_lost_everythi:
Nothing has been lost — everything you've saved is still there. Try again, and if it
          keeps happening, closing and reopening Kindred usually clears it.
what_did_you_do_what: What did you do? What did you give? How did it go?
notes_show_up_on_this: Notes show up on this day's card, trimmed to a couple of lines.
e_g_she_mentioned_wanting: e.g., She mentioned wanting a new camera lens
you_apos_ll_always_be: You'll always be reminded on the day itself.
set_one_if_this_happens: Set one if this happens at a particular time, like a class or an appointment.
try_a_name_an_occasion: Try a name, an occasion, or something you wrote in a note.
add_someone_you_care_about: Add someone you care about, or import them from your contacts.
appointments_renewals_anything: Appointments, renewals, anything you'd rather not carry in your head.
nudges_won_apos_t_reach: Nudges won't reach you until you allow them. Tap to fix.
title: Title
name: Name
anniversaries_graduations_memo: Anniversaries, graduations, memorials — add one below.
this_removes_the_day_and: This removes the day and its reminders. You'll have a moment to undo it.
the_note_disappears_right_away: The note disappears right away, with a moment to undo it.
with_none_selected_shared_occa: With none selected, shared occasions stay off your home screen entirely.
it_may_have_already_passed: It may have already passed or been deleted.
this_removes_the_day_and_1: This removes the day and any notes kept with it. You'll have a moment to undo it.
pick_a_day_and_a_month: Pick a day and a month.
we_ll_remind_you_on_the_day: We'll remind you on the day
gift_ideas_plans_anything_you_: Gift ideas, plans, anything you want to remember for this birthday.
a_one_time_event_needs_a_year: A one-time event needs a year.
mother_s_day_valentine_s_day_a: Mother's Day, Valentine's Day and more
are_you_absolutely_sure_this_w: Are you absolutely sure? This will permanently delete your account, your people, and all saved memories. This action cannot be undone.
this_is_your_last_chance_all_y: This is your last chance. All your data will be permanently erased. Are you sure you want to proceed?
delete_person_body: This removes {{name}} along with their days and notes. You'll have a moment to undo it.
delete_birthday_body: This removes {{name}}'s birthday and any notes kept with it. You'll have a moment to undo it.
delete_reminder_body: “{{title}}” and its nudges will be removed. You'll have a moment to undo it.
holidays_intro: Days everyone shares. The ones you keep appear on your home screen {{days}} days ahead, with a nudge.
reminders_help: Tap to turn one on or off. Up to {{max}}, on top of the day itself.
reminders_limit: That's {{max}} — turn one off to add another.
timefield_blurb: You'll hear in the morning, and again {{hours}} hours before — at {{time}}.
duplicate_name_body: You already have someone named “{{name}}”. Use a different name or add a last initial.
add_on_a_date_sub: An appointment, a renewal, a one-off
add_every_week_sub: A class or a routine, on set days
pick_days: Pick the days this happens on.
rec_desc_once: This event will happen only once.
contact_gone: They're no longer in this phone's contacts.
moved_to: Moved to {{date}} — that date has passed.
notes_blurb: Plans, details, anything you want to remember for this day.
on_day_plus_one: On the day, plus 1 earlier reminder
on_day_plus_other: On the day, plus {{count}} earlier reminders
could_not_save: Could not save. Check your connection and try again.
add_birthday_lands_here: Add a birthday to someone and it will land here, sorted by how soon it is.
quiet_month: A quiet month. Every saved birthday still shows under Upcoming.
name_already_here: Someone with this name is already here.
contacts_birthdays_set: Their birthdays are remembered — reminders are set
everyone_already_in: Everyone in your address book is already in Kindred.
couldnt_read_contacts: Couldn't read your contacts. Try again in a moment.
couldnt_add_them: Couldn't add them. Check your connection and try again.
home_empty_people: Add the people you care about and their days will show up here, soonest first.
home_empty_dates: Add a birthday or a special day to someone, and it will appear here.
need_sign_in_photo: You need to be signed in to add a photo.
photos_access_memory: Kindred needs access to your photos to add a memory.
photos_access_picture: Kindred needs access to your photos to set a picture.
photo_upload_failed: Could not upload that photo. Check your connection and try again.
avatar_save_failed: Photo uploaded, but saving it to your profile failed.
provide_day_month: Please provide both Day and Month for the birth date.
invalid_email_format: Please enter a valid email address format.
email_rejected: This email address is invalid or not accepted by the server.
password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
birthday_takes_from_here: Add a birthday and Kindred takes it from there
all_bought: All caught up — everything has been bought.
jot_here: Anything they mention wanting, jot it here.
memories_empty: Pictures of the two of you, things you did together.
delete_failed_body: We couldn't delete your account just now. Nothing has been changed. Please try again in a moment.
birthday_takes_from_here2: Add a birthday and Kindred takes it from there
notebook_placeholder: Anything about {{name}} — sizes, allergies, what they love, what they said last time.
